commands.repair_reason: No repair candidate remains because the latest force-push addresses the prior TDZ finding; a maintainer should run or inspect live macOS Parallels smoke proof before merge.; Cleared: The diff narrows guest temp-script permissions and does not add dependencies, workflow changes, publishing changes, or broader secret-handling surface. commands.review_summary:
The PR makes the Parallels npm-update smoke write and chmod guest scripts through the same resolved macOS desktop-user transport used to execute them, keeps owner-only permissions, and updates the focused regression assertion.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection: current main writes the macOS temp script through plain `prlctl exec` and later executes it as `--current-user` or the sudo desktop user. I did not run the live Parallels lane in this read-only review.
